languages.text: "Ничего необычного не замечал за последнее время? Говори как есть, без утайки".
"Have you noticed anything unusual of late? Speak plainly — I'll have no demurring."
languages.original_text: "Ничего необычного не замечал за последнее время? Говори как есть, без утайки".

traits.locale_text: "Have you noticed anything unusual of late? Speak plainly — I'll have no demurring."
"Have you noticed anything unusual of late? Speak plainly — I'll have no demurring."
"Have you noticed anything unusual of late? Speak plainly — I'll have no demurring."

languages.text: «¿Se ha percatado de algo peculiar últimamente? Hable con franqueza; no pondré reparos».
languages.original_text: "Have you noticed anything unusual of late? Speak plainly — I'll have no demurring."

traits.locale_text: «¿Se ha percatado de algo peculiar últimamente? Hable con franqueza; no pondré reparos».

languages.text: “最近有没有什么异常情况？有话直说，别推三阻四的。”
languages.original_text: "Have you noticed anything unusual of late? Speak plainly — I'll have no demurring."

traits.locale_text: “最近有没有什么异常情况？有话直说，别推三阻四的。”

languages.text: « Avez-vous remarqué quoi que ce soit d'inhabituel dernièrement ? Parlez sans détour, je ne vous en tiendrai pas rigueur. »
languages.original_text: "Have you noticed anything unusual of late? Speak plainly — I'll have no demurring."

traits.locale_text: « Avez-vous remarqué quoi que ce soit d'inhabituel dernièrement ? Parlez sans détour, je ne vous en tiendrai pas rigueur. »

languages.text: "Son zamanlarda olağan dışı bir şey fark ettin mi? Açık konuş. Saçmalık duymak istemiyorum."
languages.original_text: "Have you noticed anything unusual of late? Speak plainly — I'll have no demurring."

traits.locale_text: "Son zamanlarda olağan dışı bir şey fark ettin mi? Açık konuş. Saçmalık duymak istemiyorum."

languages.text: "Habt Ihr in letzter Zeit etwas Ungewöhnliches bemerkt? Sprecht frei heraus ... ich werde Euch nicht unterbrechen."
languages.original_text: "Have you noticed anything unusual of late? Speak plainly — I'll have no demurring."

traits.locale_text: "Habt Ihr in letzter Zeit etwas Ungewöhnliches bemerkt? Sprecht frei heraus ... ich werde Euch nicht unterbrechen."

languages.text: 「最近、何か変わったことありませんか？はっきり言ってください。私は、言い訳は聞きません。」
languages.original_text: "Have you noticed anything unusual of late? Speak plainly — I'll have no demurring."

traits.locale_text: 「最近、何か変わったことありませんか？はっきり言ってください。私は、言い訳は聞きません。」
